subject: Use updated ONAP SO/libs artifacts
commit_message:
Use updated ONAP SO/libs artifacts

This will probably fail until the "Port SO/lib artifacts to ONAP folder structure" change is merged.  At that point it will probably pass.

Change-Id: I186bebe21cd62dbadd1a354f07e099c9b0cdc005
Issue-ID: SO-372
Signed-off-by: Arthur Martella <amartell@research.att.com>
